1.1:
KSHIA is an integrated platform for medical institutions, universities, research institutes, cosmetic, health food, medical device, digital content & media companies.
It's a strategic bridge & hub for Korea-China skin health industry cooperation, linking markets, research, & policies to boost global competitiveness for both nations' companies.
1.10: • Connect local Chinese medical institutions, universities, research institutes, & company networks.
1.11: • Support corporate innovation & tech development via industry-academia-research based Korea-China national project links.
1.12: • Prompt & accurate info sharing on China's skin & skincare industry policy & regulatory changes.
1.13: • Provide practical market info, incl. certification, standards, & market trends.
1.14: • Discover innovative technologies through cooperation with authoritative local Chinese expert groups.
1.15: • Support new product development through joint research projects with hospitals, universities, & research institutes.
1.16: • Support brand promotion through connections with major local Chinese media outlets.
1.17: • Linked marketing with medical professionals & expert influencers active on major digital platforms.
